title: Build Offline Deployment Bundle
description: Create an internalized offline Chocolatey deployment bundle.
starter_prompt: Build an offline deployment bundle for the requested apps using SAK offline downloader.

phases.prompt: Search the built-in SAK offline downloader/package catalog for every requested app before building the bundle.
phases.completion: Built-in package candidates are captured or ambiguity is reported.

phases.prompt: Build offline bundle with internalized packages and manifest.
phases.completion: Bundle manifest and package files are created.

phases.prompt: Check manifest, package count, failed packages, sizes, and hashes.

Create a technician-readable deployment handoff report with evidence, manifest path, packages, actions/tools used, failures, verification status, hashes/artifacts, cleanup status, residual risk, and install instructions.
Remove work folders, keep bundle files and logs.

acceptance_criteria: SAK offline bundle builder was used.
